name: ratel-mcp
description: Ratel MCP gateway plugin for exposing curated upstream MCP tools through search_tools and invoke_tool.

interface.shortDescription: Expose upstream MCP servers through a searchable Ratel gateway
interface.longDescription: Ratel MCP lets Codex use one gateway server that searches and invokes tools from configured upstream MCP servers. Use it to keep agent tool surfaces small while preserving access to specialized tools.
defaultPrompt: Use Ratel MCP to find the right tool for this task
Import my Codex MCP servers into Ratel
Review my Ratel tool usage and suggest improvements
